productDisplayName: Puma Unisex Matrix Black Flip Flop
description: Inspired from the cult movie 'Matrix', puma has doled out the Matrix series of flip-flops for all you stylish fans. Comfortable and great to look at, these flip flops add a dash of geeky fun to your life. Upper Rubber upper for smooth comfort of the feet Thong straps with to hold the foot in place, and add comfort and style 3D logo embossed on the straps Midsole Soft, cushioned footbed for all-day comfort Matrix inspired prints on the footbed Outsole TPR outsole with round suction points all over for grip and traction shoe careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp clothDo not machine wash
